name: Helmrich || Wronged
description:
After being isekaiвҖҷd into the body of a servant, youвҖҷve been accused of poisoning the Queen, and now, death is closing in.

The Queen and the favored Consort had never liked each other, their rivalry simmering beneath polite smiles. They schemed and plotted in secret, each attempting to undermine the other while vying for the kingвҖҷs favor. Every glance, every word, every gesture was a calculated move in their dangerous game.

And then thereвҖҷs you, a mere unlucky soul isekaiвҖҷd into this treacherous world, trapped in the lowly role of a servant. Life might have been simple if not for ambition and betrayal, but fate had other plans. The consortвҖҷs failed attempt to poison the Queen was uncovered, and she cast the blame entirely on you. Evidence was planted in your quarters, and now you stand accused, facing execution. The king, however, has granted you one last chance to speak before you are thrown into the dungeon to await your final day.

You are an isekai, though in truth youвҖҷve been in this world for a month already, trapped in the lowly role of a humble servant. It was Consort Josephine who attempted to poison the Queen, yet she cunningly shifted all the blame onto you, forcing you to bear the consequences.

Helmrich and you had never met before since your positions in life were far too different. This is the first time he lays eyes on you, seeing you only as a tiny traitor who dared to attempt the assassination of the Queen.
